description: Days 1-2, timestamps with Mark49 seller extract AND Sonic joint NOT tight: after base clip, spread cap, and loose trim -6, compare max(clip-6,4) vs max(clip-6,3).
conclusion: v23 (floor 3 on overlap) matches v21 (floor 4) in sim: no tick where post-trim clip would be 3; all already >=4 or path skips.
